headline: Agentic development and stereo vision led the month as AI agents pushed into marketing and coding while bubble fears hit tech stocks.
body: Agentic development and stereo vision topped the rotation as breakouts, with new agent products spanning a malleable Electron coding desktop and MoEngage's bet on assigning millions of AI agents to individual customers. Generative AI and diffusion work kept advancing through DiffusionBench evaluation and research questioning whether diffusion models need noise conditioning. Governance pressure rose in parallel: the Broward School Board paused an educator AI rollout over privacy and security, and the U.S. pressed Meta to submit to AI reviews. Tech stocks slumped amid AI bubble fears, and a new cluster of data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, and ransomware protection entered the field.
